title: 什么是客户服务 / What is client service
point: 客户服务是在购买之前、之中、之后及使用产品/服务过程中提供的服务,须提供难忘体验而非机械交易。 / Client service is provided before, during and after purchasing and in using the product/service, and should deliver a memorable experience rather than a robotic transaction.
keyfacts: 组织内每个人都提供客户服务 / Everyone in the organisation provides it
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.21 — s.1.1–1.3

title: 服务更重要的动因 / Drivers of importance
point: 客户服务日益重要的四大动因:互联网与社交媒体、竞争加剧、客户控制权与选择增加、服务期望提高。 / Four drivers make client service more important: internet & social media, increasing competition, increasing client control & options, and higher expectations of service.
keyfacts: 门户与比价平台让客户一键换供应商 / Portals and aggregators let clients switch at a click
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.21 — s.3.2–3.5

title: LIA 实务守则 / LIA Code
point: 新加坡 LIA 为人寿保险公司及代表订立《LIA 人寿保险实务守则》(2021年12月版);守则 3.3 条:保单签发后30天内交付保单文件。 / The LIA established the Code of Life Insurance Practice (Dec 2021); item 3.3 — deliver the policy document within 30 days from policy issuance.
keyfacts: 签发=申请获批且全额保费已收 / Issuance = approved and full premium received
守则见本章附录 1 / Code is in Appendix 1
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.21 — s.4.2, s.8.3 (LIA Code item 3.3)

title: 解释 vs 说服 / Explanation vs persuasion
point: 解释是不旨在影响的事实性描述;说服是有意以言语影响态度或行为。 / Explanation is a factual description not aiming to influence; persuasion is an intentional verbal attempt to influence attitude or behaviour.
keyfacts: 解释举例:描述理赔流程,非推销 / Explaining a claim process is not selling
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.21 — s.5.2, s.5.12

title: 说服≠胁迫 / Persuasion ≠ coercion
point: 胁迫是使人做其实不愿做之事;说服是鼓励他人某种思考,凭公信力与合理论据通常更有效。 / Coercion makes others do what they do not want; persuasion encourages a way of thinking and, with credibility and sound reasoning, is usually more effective.
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.21 — s.5.13

title: 处理冲突四步 / Four conflict steps
point: 认识情绪/抗拒→同理并致歉→确定事实→找出适当方案;原则:先感受,后事实与行动。 / Recognise feelings/resistance → empathise and apologise → determine the facts → find an appropriate solution; rule: feelings first, then facts and action.
keyfacts: 先平复自己再安抚客户,勿说'你需要冷静' / Calm yourself first; never say 'You need to calm down'
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.21 — s.6.3–6.9, s.7.1

title: 投诉的定义与益处 / Complaint: definition and benefits
point: 投诉是对提供或未提供产品/服务的不满的口头或书面表达;它是'真相时刻',带来改善服务、提升忠诚、降低成本三大益处。 / A complaint is any oral or written expression of dissatisfaction about the provision or failure to provide a product/service; it is a 'moment of truth' bringing improved service, greater loyalty and reduced cost.
keyfacts: 无论是否合理,可代他人提出 / Justified or not, on one's own or another's behalf
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.21 — s.8.5–8.9

title: 问题解决法 / Problem-solving approach
point: 把客户视为解决方案的一部分:识别真正问题→找原因→定可能方案(邀客户共解)→兼顾双方需求(双赢)→择一实施→讨论→实施→复盘。 / View the client as part of the solution: identify the real problem → find causes → determine solutions (involve the client) → address both needs (win-win) → select one → discuss → implement → review.
keyfacts: 问句:'我们如何一起解决这个问题?' / 'How can we work together to resolve this?'
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.21 — s.8.10

title: 吸引与留住客户 / Attraction and retention
point: 涉及客户忠诚、吸引新客户、客户聚焦、满足期望、改善关系、保持知情;获取新客户比留住现有客户更昂贵。 / Involves loyalty, attracting new clients, client focus, meeting expectations, improving relationships and keeping clients updated; acquiring a new client costs more than retaining one.
keyfacts: 满意客户=有效'广告'与转介来源 / Satisfied clients are 'advertising' and referrals
联系频率越高,信任越强 / More contact builds more trust
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.21 — s.9.1–9.14

title: 调查 vs 问卷 / Survey vs questionnaire
point: 调查是一系列精心设计的开放/提取式问题;问卷则提供措辞化答案选项(如'一般/好/优秀'或1至5评分)。 / A survey uses carefully crafted questions to extract information; a questionnaire offers worded answer choices (e.g. 'average/good/excellent' or a 1-to-5 score).
keyfacts: 问卷可纸质、电子或电话进行 / Questionnaires can be paper, electronic or telephone
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.21 — s.10.3–10.4

title: 交叉销售 / Cross-selling
point: 交叉销售是向现有保单持有人销售不同的产品(如已有终身寿险者交叉销售危疾保险);关键要素与任何销售相同。 / Cross-selling is selling a different product to an existing policyholder (e.g. Critical Illness to a Whole Life holder); its key elements are the same as any selling process.
keyfacts: 建立融洽与信任、产品知识、需求分析 / Rapport and trust, product knowledge, needs analysis
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.21 — s.11.7–11.8

title: 售后忠诚与留存 / Post-sales loyalty
point: 售后两要点:一致交付(贯穿整个关系兑现承诺)与主动客户关系管理(主动增值,如检视组合与投资);勿自满。 / Two post-sales keys: consistent delivery (keep promises throughout the relationship) and proactive client relationship management (add value, e.g. portfolio/investment reviews); never be complacent.
keyfacts: 始终把客户当作正争取的新业务 / Treat the client as new business to be won
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.21 — s.12.1–12.5
